a.xlink:title: Abstract base class for all simulation elements.
Spatially correlated Gaussian noise source — cedar-compatible.
Full-matrix learned coupling between two neural fields.
Sparse Gaussian field coupling with a fixed, user-defined projection.
Localized Gaussian input stimulus applied to a neural field.
Abstract base class for all convolution-based interaction kernels.
Persistent spatial memory that accumulates and decays field activity.
Continuous attractor neural field — the core DFT building block.
Additive Gaussian noise source for neural fields.
Spatially shifted Gaussian kernel that induces directional peak drift.
Gaussian convolution kernel providing local excitation and optional global inhibition.
Difference-of-Gaussians convolution kernel for DFT lateral interactions.
Damped-cosine convolution kernel for oscillatory field dynamics.
